'''Garth''' was the husband of [[Ganeed]], the sister of the [[King/Legends|King]] [[Meenon]] of [[Senali]]. He had five children: [[Hinen]], [[Jaret]], [[Drenna]], [[Tinta (Senali)|Tinta]], and [[Bu]]. He welcomed [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] when they visited Senali.

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Shattered Peace]]'' {{1st}}
